title: ammannia sanguinolenta subsp. robusta
intro: Ammannia sanguinolenta subsp. robusta is a sub-species of the Ammannia sanguinolenta plant, commonly known as a type of flowering plant. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ammannia sanguinolenta subsp. robusta include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing protection against infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
